At Ozi Quality Painting Services , we prioritise careful planning, clear communication, and respectful workmanship in every project. We provide NDIS house painting services that create safe, practical, and comfortable homes. From bedrooms and bathrooms to living areas, cabinets, decks, fences, and exteriors, we use durable, easy-to-clean finishes that support daily routines, enhance accessibility, and protect the home from moisture, wear, and weather—all while minimising disruption.

# Ozi Quality Painting Services

Ozi Quality Painting Services is a Sydney-based company providing professional painting and decorating services including interior painting, exterior painting, residential painting, commercial painting, colour consultation, wallpaper removal, and surface preparation. Contact:
- Phone: +61 450 936 281
- Email: rossward@gmail. com
- Address: Sydney, NSW
- Website: https://oziqualitypaintingservices. com. au/

Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.
